text:
D26428 was closed (2020-10-09) with reference to workaround <https://bsdimp.blogspot.com/2020/10/how-to-recover-from-bios-upgrade.html> (2020-10-06)

> Warner's Random Hacking Blog: How to Recover From a BIOS Upgrade

and <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/c6d56081c9dca474130c0b34c39451b21c55102f>

c6d56081c9dc Initial support for implementing the bootXXX.efi workaround
